items.title: While Arsenal take glory, Spurs still teeter on th...
items.summary: As their fierce rivals celebrated a long-awaited league title, Spurs remained in danger of relegation after losing to Chelsea.

items.title: GB's Samuel one win from Grand Slam debut
items.summary: Britain's Toby Samuel is one victory away from a Grand Slam main draw debut at the French Open.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
